user_message: Review docs/brainstorms/v0-6-0-roadmap-plan.md as a requirements/roadmap document. Return concise findings with title, severity P0-P3, section, why it matters, autofix_class, confidence, evidence quote, suggested fix. Focus on scope creep, release slicing, requirement count, whether v0.6.0 is too broad, and minimum viable scope. Document content is the v0.6.0 roadmap plan with 11 action items across outcome enum/schema, accepted ranking boost, rejected alternative CLI, tests/docs.
assistant_summary: 요청 범위는 문서 리뷰입니다. 먼저 해당 로드맵 문서와 관련된 기존 결정/레슨이 있는지 확인한 뒤, 과도한 범위와 릴리스 슬라이싱 관점으로만 압축해서 findings를 내겠습니다.
